candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing/subtotal line, not preferred when an explicit total current assets line exists.

variables.notes: Explicit reported total current assets line exists.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash flow beginning/ending balance lines for CHE.
Cash-like but not standard cash and cash equivalents; not preferred for CHE.
Could reconcile to balance-sheet cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.
Direct match for total current liabilities.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not preferred when an explicit total exists.

variables.notes: Explicit reported total current liabilities line exists.

candidates.why: Most plausible short-term debt label; under IFRS this often represents borrowings. However the same label also appears in the non-current section, creating ambiguity.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current maturity item, but explicitly lease-related and should be excluded from baseline STD.
Debt-like current liability, but leases must be excluded from baseline STD.

variables.notes: R:nc. Chose 'Loans and borrowings' as the best semantic match for short-term debt, likely the current occurrence in the current-liabilities section. Manual review needed because the identical row label also appears in the non-current section, so the sheet preview does not fully disambiguate current vs non-current occurrence.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Direct PPE line and preferred over gross or balancing-value variants.
Gross PPE total, but net/standard PPE line is preferred when available.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, less preferred than the reported PPE line.

variables.notes: Preferred the direct PPE line over gross and balancing-value alternatives.
Explicit reported total assets line exists.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Direct match for operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities

variables.notes: Direct cash flow statement operating cash flow line.
